title: Opening for Software Engineer at Netmeds Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Netmeds Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netmeds Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Netmeds Holdings Services:
Netmeds Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds Holdings Services!
